questions.text: What does SVD (Singular Value Decomposition) do?
options: Factors a matrix into three simpler matrices
questions.correctAnswer: Factors a matrix into three simpler matrices

questions.text: In SVD, what do singular values represent?
options: The importance or strength of each singular vector pair
The number of rows and columns
questions.correctAnswer: The importance or strength of each singular vector pair

questions.text: Why is SVD useful for low-rank approximation?
options: We can keep only the largest singular values and discard small ones
questions.correctAnswer: We can keep only the largest singular values and discard small ones

questions.text: Explain how SVD is used to compress information. What information might be lost when we reduce to fewer singular values?
What is the relationship between eigenvalues and singular values?
options: Singular values are square roots of eigenvalues of A^T A
questions.correctAnswer: Singular values are square roots of eigenvalues of A^T A

questions.text: What is the dimension of U in SVD when A is 1000x500?
How could SVD be applied to analyze a model's weight matrix? What would large vs. small singular values tell us about the model?
